task: Safe-additive Block 6 (B7) — read-only driver-inbox reporting. New GET /api/v1/driver-finance/inbox-reporting?operating_company_id&from&to (role-gated Owner/Admin/Manager/Accountant/Dispatcher, withCompanyScope) aggregating the B4 timeline view (views.driver_request_timeline: seconds_requested_to_viewed / seconds_requested_to_decision) joined to cash_advance_requests: summary + per-driver time-to-view, time-to-approve, approval-rate, total approved advance volume. New page /driver-hub/reporting (date-range filter + summary cards + per-driver table + CSV export) linked from the Driver Hub header (canReview only). READ-ONLY: no mutations, no money path, no migration (reads existing data). advance-volume-by-TRIP listed in not_computed (driver_advances has no load FK) per Jorge's ship-the-rest rule.
